defaultTilePrototype.description: Base tile JSON for Tile Editor v4 when creating tiles or re-applying; id/label are set by the editor.

objects.description: Logical objects: { id, tileIds[] } plus optional editor/runtime flags.

spawnFirstMemberOnly.description: When true, procedural placement that picks a random member tile will only ever pick tileIds[0].

spawnAirOnly.description: Legacy: air-only spawn hint. Prefer canSpawnOnGround + canSpawnInAir; readers still honor this when the new keys are absent.

objectType.description: Logical layout kind: tile+variations (default) = procedural EMPTY deco picks any member with equal chance; candle = only tileIds[0] in procedural picks; full object = multi-tile package (random deco uses first member only as anchor); autotile = neighbor-role pieces (random deco uses first member only; draw uses each tile's autotile JSON).

roomKinds.description: Optional whitelist of room kinds for this object; mirrors member tile roomScope allowRoomKinds when synced.

canSpawnOnGround.description: When false, procedural deco placement skips grounded cells for this object's tiles (unless legacy spawnAirOnly implies false).

canSpawnInAir.description: When true with canSpawnOnGround false, member tiles get implicit air-only deco placement rules (legacy spawnAirOnly).

gardeningPluckable.description: When true, EMPTY deco from this object may be plucked with gardening gloves (grass-like pickup and loot). Legacy tilesets treat objects id grass and blue grass as pluckable when this key is absent.

mapTerrain.description: Object-level gameplay terrain; synced to every member tile mapTerrain in the editor save path.

decoBlobClusterChannel.description: Ambient procedural deco clusters: restrict this object's tiles to red- or blue-tinted ARGB blob sampling only. Omit for both channels (tiles not owned by any object still appear in both).

memberGraphLayout.description: Tile Editor v4: logical member positions on a square grid (grid side ≥ member count, min 4). cells[] lists { tileId, x, y }; OK on Member layout derives orthogonal autotile.connectsWithTileIds from adjacency within each connected island. Disconnected islands each autotile independently at runtime.

requireAllNeighbors.description: Interior tile: must be fully surrounded by connected grid neighbors at authoring time; mirrored to autotile.requireAllNeighbors.

requireNoNeighbors.description: Isolated tile: must have no connecting neighbors; mirrored to autotile.requireNoNeighbors.

quadrantComposite.description: Inner-corner overlay source tile (one per object); mirrored to autotile.quadrantComposite.

autotileProfiles.description: DEPRECATED: legacy bitmask/verticalStack autotile profiles. Retired in favor of the canonical member-graph model (objects[].memberGraphLayout + per-tile autotile.connectsWithTileIds). Empty arrays are dropped by Tile Editor v4's 'Migrate legacy autotile' pass.

autotileConnectGroups.description: DEPRECATED: legacy shared autotile connect sets referenced by tile autotile.connectGroupId. Retired in favor of per-tile autotile.connectsWithTileIds derived from the member-graph layout.

hvstAutotileGroups.description: DEPRECATED: legacy TileEditorV3 HVST autotile groups. Retired in favor of the canonical member-graph model; stripped by Tile Editor v4's 'Migrate legacy autotile' pass.

decoTilePool.description: Library tile ids randomly chosen for procedural DecoTile overlays.

dungeonShaftLadderTileId.description: Optional v3 tile id drawn only on dungeon shaft / room-transition ladder tiles (map column matches GeneratedRoom.ladderColumnTx). Other ladder columns still use terrain bridge.

dungeonShaftLadderObjectId.description: Alternative to dungeonShaftLadderTileId: objects[].id; uses that object's tileIds[0] as the shaft ladder visual.

decoTilePlacementRules.description: Per-deco-tile placement constraints applied as a post-pass on the generator's DecoTile list.

groundOnly.description: Cell directly below must be solid (e.g. SOLID/BREAKABLE/PLATFORM).

airOnly.description: Cell must be empty air AND the cell below must NOT be standable ground.

spawnWeight.description: Global keep probability for this deco id (0..1).

preferAboveObjects.description: object ids whose tileIds count as preferred ground neighbors below this deco.

preferAboveWeight.description: Probability of keeping a deco that is above ground but NOT above a preferred object (0 = log-only, 1 = no preference).

preferAdjacentToObjects.description: Object ids (expanded to tile ids): keep procedural deco only when a neighbor cell displays one of those tiles; orthogonal vs diagonal is controlled by the adjacent weight fields (default orthogonal-only).

preferAdjacentOrthogonalWeight.description: When > 0 with preferAdjacentToObjects, orthogonal neighbors count toward the adjacent gate (default 1). If both this and preferAdjacentDiagonalWeight are <= 0, runtime treats orthogonal as 1.

preferAdjacentDiagonalWeight.description: When > 0 with preferAdjacentToObjects, diagonal neighbors count toward the adjacent gate (default 0 for legacy orthogonal-only behavior).

terrainBridge.description: Maps TileMap terrain codes to v3 display/connect tile ids (replaces legacy terrain_bridge.json sidecar).

proceduralRoomGen.description: Object-keyed procedural deco pools and optional RoomGenerator tunables per room kind.

decoPoolsByRoomKind.description: Keys: START, NORMAL, ITEM, SHOP, BOSS, SECRET, SUPER_SECRET. Values: arrays of { objectId, weight?, tileIds?, memberIndices? }.

weight.description: Relative weight; may be fractional (e.g. 0.5). Integer weights repeat that many times in the expanded pick multiset.

tileIds.description: Subset of that object's tileIds; if omitted, all members are used.

memberIndices.description: 0-based indices into objects[].tileIds; ignored if tileIds is set.

editorAutoEmptyDeco.description: When true, row is managed by TileEditorV4 Save (EMPTY member auto-pool); stripped before rewrite.

terrainBridgePoolByRoomKind.description: Keys: START, NORMAL, ITEM, SHOP, BOSS, SECRET, SUPER_SECRET. Objects-tab Weight column for non-EMPTY mapTerrain: relative weights merged into terrainBridge.displayChoicesByRoomKind on Save.

weight.description: Relative weight vs other terrain-bridge entries in this room kind (integer-rounded when building displayChoices).

placedPropsByRoomKind.description: Keys: START, NORMAL, ITEM, SHOP, BOSS, SECRET, SUPER_SECRET. Pixel-placed logical objects on the floor (PlacedRoomObject); not deco blobs. Each room runs round(sum(weights)) placement attempts; each attempt picks one entry at random in proportion to weight (legacy count field is read as weight).

weight.description: Relative spawn weight vs other placed props in this room kind.

count.description: Legacy: treated as weight when weight is omitted.

solidsOnly.description: Legacy opt-in. When true, the object must have at least one member with mapTerrain SOLID (and RoomScope). Omitted or false: any member allowed by RoomScope suffices (PLATFORM, BREAKABLE, etc.). Default at runtime is false.

tunablesByRoomKind.description: Optional overrides for procedural placement; omitted fields use engine defaults.

decoClusterFallbackTileIdsByRoomKind.description: Per DungeonLayout.RoomKind.name(): when the procedural deco pick multiset is empty, map legacy cluster ARGB channels to real v3 tile ids (red/blue ambient clusters, ITEM/SHOP overlay tints). Blank fields are auto-filled from the merged deco pool when possible.

normalBiomes.description: Legacy flat biome list (migrated into normalBiomesBySheet on load). Prefer normalBiomesBySheet.

normalBiomesBySheet.description: Sheet id → weighted NORMAL-room biome list. On first migration, legacy normalBiomes copy to the "main" sheet only; other sheets start with a default row.

weight.description: Relative rarity vs other biomes on this sheet when rolling per NORMAL room.

decoPool.description: Replaces proceduralRoomGen.decoPoolsByRoomKind.NORMAL when this biome is active.

contextThemeRules.description: Replaces top-level contextThemeRules for this biome's NORMAL rooms.

floorRange.description: Restricts procedural placement to in-game dungeon floors (gridY). { min, max } is inclusive; omit max for an open-ended floor >= min (deep-floor fallback). Absent floorRange = every floor.

terrainBridgeWeight.description: Relative weight in procedural terrainBridge displayChoices pool for this tile's mapTerrain.

terrainBridgeConnectAnchor.description: When true, this tile id becomes connectAsTileId for its terrain bucket (else first tile id lexicographically).

canBreakAsDeco.description: When true and this tile appears as procedural deco, each placement may roll sword-breakable (see breakableDecoChance).

breakableDecoChance.description: Probability [0–1] that a spawned deco instance is breakable (e.g. 0.15 = 15%). Requires canBreakAsDeco.

breakableDeco.description: Legacy: treated as canBreakAsDeco with chance 1.0 if breakableDecoChance is absent.

profileId.description: DEPRECATED: legacy bitmask/verticalStack profile id. Retired in favor of member-graph connectsWithTileIds.

connectGroupId.description: DEPRECATED: legacy shared connect-group reference. Use connectsWithTileIds (derived from the member-graph layout).

hvstGroupId.description: DEPRECATED: legacy HVST group reference. Stripped by Tile Editor v4's 'Migrate legacy autotile' pass; horizontal-strip footprint is now derived from the object's member-graph island orientation.

requireAllNeighbors.description: Member-graph autotile: this tile is only picked when all four orthogonal sides have connecting terrain.

requireNoNeighbors.description: Member-graph autotile: this tile is only picked when no orthogonal side has connecting terrain (isolated).

quadrantComposite.description: Inner-corner overlay source: one 16×16 tile whose four 8×8 quadrants stamp concave corners when two ortho neighbors connect and the shared diagonal does not.
